The Motivation

From Spreadsheet Chaos to Vault Mastery

As a collector, I lived with a constant background hum of inventory anxiety. My collection had grown into serious money, but my system for tracking it was frozen in a half-finished spreadsheet. Every time I added a new piece, the excitement crashed into frustration: manual data entry, missing specs, and the gnawing question — "if something happened today, would my insurance paperwork actually be ready?"

I built ARMORY because the tools that existed made me feel like I was managing a supply chain instead of stewarding a collection. ARMORY is different. Point your camera. Get a complete record. Sleep better.

Your collection deserves a vault, not a spreadsheet. Your data deserves privacy, not a cloud account.
— JOHN LAZZARO, CREATOR

Capabilities

Built For Excellence

📸
One-Scan Intake
Point your camera at the firearm. Computer vision reads make, model, serial, and barrel markings in seconds. Zero typing required.
CORE FEATURE
🧠
Groq Intelligence
LLM-powered descriptions pull manufacturer history, production variants, and technical specs automatically. Your vault reads like a museum.
📍
Storage Mapping
Every piece knows where it lives. Safe, vault, display case — manage your collection geography visually.
📄
Insurance Ready
One-tap PDF exports with serial numbers, values, condition photos, and historical data. Hand it to your agent. Done.
📊
Maintenance Log
Track round counts, service history, condition notes. Never lose a maintenance record. Complete audit trail.
🔒
100% Private
PWA. No accounts. No cloud. Your data and API keys never leave your device. Complete data sovereignty.
Philosophy

Built By A Collector, For Collectors

∞
ZERO ACCOUNTS
🏗
Built Right
Single-file HTML PWA. Vanilla JavaScript. No build tools. No dependencies. Fast. Reliable. Yours to keep.
🔐
Privacy First
Your collection stays on your device. Your API keys never leave your phone. No tracking. No telemetry. No compromise.
💎
Premium UX
Designed for people who care about details. Dark luxury aesthetic. Thoughtful interactions. Respects your time.
🎯
One Job
ARMORY does one thing exceptionally well: transform chaos into order. That's it. That's the mission.

Ready to Master Your Vault?

ARMORY runs in your browser as a PWA — open it on any device and install directly from the browser. No app store. No middleman.
